prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为5302→4706→4606→3742→3292，整体呈持续前移趋势（位次数字减小），近4年累计前移约2010名，2025年基准约3292名，反映出该校 在云南省的录取竞争逐年加剧；该校在云南省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年64人、2022年64人、2023年66人、2024年66人、2025年68人，呈缓慢扩招态势；202 6年计划65人，较2025年减少3人，小幅缩招约4.4%，对竞争略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第37名，近年稳定 在35–37名区间，属于全国顶尖211行列，工科实力突出；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏正面：投档线稳步提升（从211第14升至第3）、入选国家卓越工程师学院、 保研率提升至27%；2026年周期出现实验室爆炸火灾事故（偏负面），但整体声誉基础稳固；抖音热度排名第61（一般），短视频曝光量中等；第五轮学科评估A -及以上共7个：力学A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、航空宇航科学与技术A-、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、软件工程A-，航空航天类为该校王牌专业，对高分考生 吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与该校优势学科高度契合；云南省2026年高考总人数377,900人，按近年物理 类占比约60.6%估算约229,000人，较2025年物理类173,282人增长约32%，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3292、2026 年小幅缩招（缓解竞争）、本省考生总数大幅增加（加剧竞争）以及学校声誉与学科优势持续吸引高分考生；预测2026年最低位次约3255 名，区间2767–3743名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 航空航天类（飞行器设计与工程等）
- 软件工程
- 信息安全。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化
- 电子信息类
- 机械工程
- 应用物理学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料科学与工程
- 土木工程
- 管理科学与工程类
- 交通运输（机场运行与管理/民航机务工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2767–3743名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业（航空航天类、软件工程）作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如2700名以内） 可重点冲击一档航空航天类；位次接近区间上限（如3700名左右）应以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were 5302 → 4706 → 4606 → 3742 → 3292, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative advance of about 2010 places in the past 4 years, and a baseline of about 3292 in 2025, reflecting the increasing competition for admission in Yunnan Province; the enrollment plan for science/physics category in Yunnan Province: 64 in 2021, 64 in 2022, 66 in 2023, 66 in 2024, 68 in 2025, showing a slow expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 65, a decrease of 3 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 4.4%, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 37th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 35–37 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national 211 universities, with outstanding engineering strength; the reputation evaluation in the 2025 college entrance examination cycle is relatively positive: the admission score line has steadily increased (from 14th to 3rd among 211 universities), selected for the National Excellent Engineer Academy, and the graduate school recommendation rate increased to 27%; in the 2026 cycle, there was a laboratory explosion fire accident (somewhat negative), but the overall reputation foundation is solid; Douyin popularity ranking 61st (average), short video exposure is moderate; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 7 disciplines rated A- or above: Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Aerospace Science and Technology A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, with aerospace being the flagship major, strongly attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with the university's advantageous disciplines; the total number of candidates in Yunnan Province for the 2026 college entrance examination is 377,900, estimated at about 229,000 based on the recent physics category proportion of about 60.6%, an increase of about 32% compared to the 173,282 physics category candidates in 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 3292, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (alleviating competition), the significant increase in the number of candidates in the province (intensifying competition), and the school's reputation and disciplinary advantages continuing to attract high-scoring students; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 3255, with a range of 2767–3743.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Aerospace (Aircraft Design and Engineering, etc.)
- Software Engineering
- Information Security.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Automation
- Electronic Information
- Mechanical Engineering
- Applied Physics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Civil Engineering
- Management Science and Engineering
- Transportation (Airport Operation and Management/Civil Aviation Maintenance Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 2767–3743, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 flagship majors (Aerospace, Software Engineering) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2700), focus on Tier 1 Aerospace; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 3700), prioritize Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as a supplement.

_translation.university_name_en: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics
